name: hamsoo
description: Hamsoo - RTL/Persian typography helper for AI chat sites. Single-source build for Chromium and Firefox.
author: NaxonM

scripts.verify: node scripts/check.js && node build.js && node test/run.js
scripts.zip: node build.js && cd dist && rm -f hamsoo-chromium.zip hamsoo-firefox.zip && zip -rq hamsoo-chromium.zip hamsoo-chromium && zip -rq hamsoo-firefox.zip hamsoo-firefox
